_comment: bestconfig: 254M Muon baseline (h100_proxy geometry). NOTE: kings #618 and #572 were reverted as forgeries (data-bypass / compute), so canonical cosine_lr is plain cosine again and the model has no readout-calibration head. This config stacks two clean, honored upgrades over that baseline: (1) embed_lr=0.015 (embeddings/head train ~19x faster than the 8e-4 AdamW peak; norms stay on max_lr); (2) schedule=wsd, stable_frac=0.8 (re-added cleanly, LR-shape only, no data bypass). A/B each independently before trusting the stack. logit_softcap is still not config-reachable (needs a build_model thread-through).
